title: Judgment-as-detector seed graph

edges.rationale: Reported acceptability is evidence for licensing only through a fallible detector.
Processing load can shift the detector output.
Prescriptive ideology can shift the response under judgment tasks.
Correctness, naturalness, and register cues change the response criterion.
Judgment reports are evidence used in attribution, not transparent access to the target.

notes: Seed imported from the judgments-as-detectors project. It may underweight production-side and diachronic dynamics. Scores remain zero pending adversarial critique.
